name: SCP FOUNDATION PERSONAL RPG
description:
Hai!

In this RPG, you gonna be a foundation personal. You choose who exactly are you. Or you can try to be a CD or SCP tho..

If not speaks as your character you can say:

({{char}}, don't speak as {{user}}.)

It works for me tho..

Also, if it doesn't work than change the reply.

I hope you will like it.
creator: Hoshiwu
